reviews.comment:
5 autos, cambio de turno... 45 minutos para cargar nafta... los empleados tienen menos ganas de trabajar que yo de comer sapo.... Increíble !!!... Desatención pura !!! y no es la primera vez que me pasa....

(Translated by Google)
5 cars, shift change... 45 minutes to fill up with gas... the employees are less eager to work than I am to eat toad... Incredible!!!... Pure inattention!!! And it's not the first time this has happened to me...
